query: Temu Local Seller Program number of countries expansion date

{"query":"Temu Local Seller Program number of countries expansion date","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1190,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.indexbox.io/blog/temu-launches-uae-local-seller-programme-in-2026-expansion/","title":"Temu UAE Expansion: Local Seller Programme Launched January 2026 - News and Statistics - IndexBox","content":"According to analytics firm SimilarWeb, Temu was the top-ranked shopping app on Android in the UAE as of January 1, 2026, based on usage data."},{"url":"https://www.turkiyetoday.com/business/chinese-temu-launches-local-seller-program-in-turkiye-offering-next-day-delivery-3206315","title":"Chinese Temu launches local seller program in Türkiye, offering next-day delivery - Türkiye Today","content":"The move follows Temu’s completion of local entity registration and the establishment of its Istanbul office in June, upon the request of the Turkish Trade Ministry.
A company spokesperson said the local-to-local program is designed to expand opportunities for Turkish businesses while providing consumers with access to affordable, quality products delivered faster.
Temu noted that its local-to-local approach is already active in more than 30 countries, including the United States, Germany, France, Italy, Spain, and Mexico."},{"url":"https://amzscout.net/blog/temu-statistics/","title":"18 Latest Temu Statistics for 2025: Key Facts and Numbers","content":"Please note that this information is accurate only as of the date this article was written.
In the second quarter of 2025, the e-commerce giant’s global monthly active users (MAU) soared to 416.5 million, a striking 68% jump from a year ago and a solid 3% gain from the previous quarter.
Temu’s cumulative downloads cracked the 1 billion mark in Q2, marking a staggering 93% increase compared to last year and a 12% rise since Q1.
However, there currently are around 100,000 sellers in the U.S. and 200,000 international merchants.
As Temu continues to expand, they aim to increase these numbers to 200,000 U.S. sellers and 300,000 international sellers, respectively.
In select markets, including the United States, Canada, Australia, and the United Kingdom, Temu also operates local warehouses to speed up delivery times for certain items.
The company’s expansion strategy is particularly focused on home goods, aiming to bring U.S. shoppers an even broader selection without sacrificing the platform’s signature affordability.
In 2025, PDD Holdings (the parent company behind Temu) boasts a net worth of $128.79 billion.
As of early 2025, Temu boasts an impressive 292 million monthly active users worldwide, including 185.6 million in the U.S. and 92 million across the European Union."},{"url":"https://cube.asia/read/temu-market-expansion-southeast-asia-vietnam-indonesia-regulations/","title":"Temu Attempts to Expand into Southeast Asia: Will Vietnamese and Indonesian Regulators Allow Consumers to “Shop Like a Billionaire”?","content":"In the past three years, Temu has been working its way into the United States, Canada, Australia, New Zealand, and Europe with much success.
However, expansion into the Southeast Asian region has been a bit trickier.
The company has strong competition for e-commerce market share in Southeast Asia; Temu directly competes with more established e-commerce platforms in the area such as Shopee, Lazada, and TikTok Shop.
Its pricing is also not as competitive in Southeast Asia as it is in other markets; in fact, 3 out of 5 products in Temu cost more than on Shopee, Lazada, and TikTok Shop.
This model was tested in Europe and indicates that this type of model reduces seller costs by up to 30% and boosts order fulfillment rates to 95%.
Temu faces compliance issues in its expansion into Southeast Asia, but there is no doubt that Temu has a solid and attractive offer for consumers, and if their performance in other global markets is any indicator, Southeast Asian shoppers will quickly adopt the platform."}]}

Temu is a global e-commerce platform that helps businesses reach more customers and grow online. As part of that effort, Temu launched its Local Seller Program to enable eligible local businesses to sell through local warehousing and delivery. Initially built to support local sellers serving local consumers, the program is now beginning to expand in some regions, allowing eligible sellers to reach nearby and regional markets as well. ### What is Temu’s Local Seller Program? Temu’s Local Seller Program allows eligible local businesses to sell on Temu through local warehousing and delivery. Yes. Temu’s Local Seller Program is gradually opening nearby and regional markets to eligible sellers. ### How can Temu’s Local Seller Program help my business grow? ### As a small business seller, is Temu’s Local Seller Program right for me? ### What can I sell through Temu’s Local Seller Program?","score":0.5521781,"raw_content":null}],"response_time":0.79,"request_id":"1ca7b875-1699-4d28-b57c-9d988b603ba9"}
